COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED BY THE COURT AT ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-28-2006 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED AT THE REQUEST OF THE CROSS-COMPLAINANT THAT THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for defendant and cross-complainant. No appearance for plaintiff. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that the complaint is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. It is further ordered at the request of the cross-complainant that the cross-complaint is dismissed. Proceedings reported by: Wendy Pun, CSR# 12891 (212)

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Continued To Feb-28-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearances for Defendant and Cross-Complainant, and Defendant and Cross-Defendant. No appearance for plaintiff in Propria Persona. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC addressed to plaintiff in propria persona is re-set to 2/28/06 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR #7165 (212)
